name: Mattock
author: Drew Edwards (2020); AGP module
description: Mine a labyrinth of tiles through the rock — but no tile may ever touch more than three others, or the mine collapses. Miners walk the corridors, choke off territory, and evict lone enemy miners. If you cannot mine on your turn, you lose. By Drew Edwards (formerly 'Las Médulas'), featured in Abstract Games #21.
